description: Real SAC data binding result — filtered to March 2026. Shows time hierarchy with month and day levels. Only accounts with data for this period appear in rows.

notes.time_hierarchy: Year → Month → Day. Month ID: [Posting_Date].[YMD].[Posting_Date.CALMONTH].[202603]. Day ID: [Posting_Date].[YMD].&[2026-03-01]
notes.missing_measures: measures_0-3 and measures_6-8 not in data rows (no data for this period or filtered out)
notes.duplicate_rows: Both month aggregate (isNode:true) and day detail rows present — filter by isNode for monthly view
